positive: A stylized illustration of a mystical forest glowing at twilight. Focus on interlocking silhouettes of various oversized flora (giant ferns, glowing mushrooms, winding roots) and whimsical fauna (a fox curled in sleep, a soaring moth). The composition should be radially symmetrical, placing the main action in the center. Use a deep jewel-toned palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with bioluminescent pops of gold and cyan. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau linework and modern digital screen printing, ensuring high contrast and clean edges for maximum apparel print clarity. Minimal shading, strong outlines, highly decorative.
